title: leucanthemum vulgare subsp. ircutianum
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. ircutianum, also known as the Russian daisy or Oxeye daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. ircutianum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. ircutianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, or used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
